allow: Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute calorie-app-db --remote --command "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table'' AND name IN \(''user_supplements'',''supplement_logs''\);")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute calorie-app-db --command="ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN tdee INTEGER" --remote)
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute calorie-app-db --command="ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN bmr INTEGER" --remote)
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute calorie-app-db --command="ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN pal_factor REAL" --remote)
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute calorie-app-db --command="ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN formula_used TEXT" --remote)
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute calorie-app-db --command="ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN tdee_calculated_at TEXT" --remote)
